title: docs_fix_artifact
description: Artifact produced by the fixing room: a record of the doc edits the docs_writer agent applied to the working tree (uncommitted) in response to the stale_docs listing carried by the verdict.

applied.description: True if every stale_docs entry was addressed by at least one edit; false if the agent gave up on one or more entries (blockers[] must then be populated).

summary.description: One-paragraph narrative of what was changed and why — should cite each touched doc.

files_changed.description: Every doc file the agent edited or created in the working tree, repo-relative. May be empty only when applied=false and blockers explain why.

change.description: One sentence on what was changed in this file.

unresolved.description: stale_docs entries (by path + lines) that were NOT addressed. Empty when applied=true.

reason.description: Why the agent skipped this entry (ambiguous fix, missing source, conflicting guidance, etc).

blockers.description: Populated when applied=false. Each entry describes one reason the run could not complete.
